prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document relates specifically to the STATS19 road collision data collection which is applicable in England. The guidance discusses changes in data collection practices that affect police forces in England, and references to the Department for Transport (DfT) indicate its relevance within England's jurisdiction.
